---
title: "Ways of Thinking"
---


# Ways of Thinking

An evolving collection of ideas behind **The Ecology of the Mind**.

## Essays

- [Thinking Across Scales](thinking-across-scales.qmd)
- [Seeing Across Scales](seeing-across-scales.qmd)
- [Spinning Across Scales](spinning-across-scales.qmd)
- Ecological Accounting *(coming soon)*
- Political Ecology *(coming soon)*
- The Ecology of Ideas *(coming soon)*
